# Integration decision — 2026-06-27

Gates:
  H1 Stardust: PASS (CV 0.0009)
  H1 Laptop:   PASS (CV 0.0002, tinyllama fallback)
  H2 Stardust: PASS (0.00% order delta)
  H3 Stardust: FAIL (0.00% v0.8 vs v0.12)

Decision per acceptance criteria:
  H1+H3 did NOT both pass → keep concurrency fitness weight 0 (observe-only).
  seed_organism.py NOT modified.

Verdict:
  Aggregate parallel tok/s IS selection-grade for repeatability on founder fleet.
  It is NOT discriminative for the current memory-class parent stack (v0.12).

Next measurement target:
  Scheduler-axis candidate preset vs v0.12 parent; re-test H3 before any weight.
